title: AI Model Configuration
subtitle: Configure runtime parameters for LLM and embedding providers

notice.title: Configuration Note
notice.description: Settings on this page are persisted in the database and take effect immediately. Empty fields will use environment variable (.env) defaults.

llm_provider.label: LLM Provider
llm_provider.tooltip: Choose an LLM provider. Leave empty for rule-engine-only mode (no AI calls).

llm_api_key.label: API Key
llm_api_key.tooltip: API key for the LLM service. Displays as ******** when saved; leave empty to keep unchanged.
llm_api_key.placeholder: Enter API Key or leave empty to keep current

llm_model.label: Model Name
llm_model.tooltip: Model identifier, e.g., claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o, qwen2.5:7b. Leave empty for provider default.

llm_base_url.label: Base URL
llm_base_url.tooltip: Required for local provider only, e.g., http://localhost:11434 (Ollama).

embedding_provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding_provider.tooltip: Leave empty to inherit from LLM Provider.

embedding_dimensions.label: Vector Dimensions
embedding_dimensions.tooltip: 1536 for OpenAI, 768 for nomic-embed-text, 1024 for BGE-M3.

search_vector_weight.label: Vector Search Weight
search_vector_weight.tooltip: Weight for vector search in RRF hybrid search (0-1).

search_fulltext_weight.label: Fulltext Search Weight
search_fulltext_weight.tooltip: Weight for fulltext search in RRF hybrid search (0-1).

messages.validationFailed: Form validation failed, please check inputs

testResult.title: Connection Test Result
testResult.hint: The test uses the values currently in the form (even if unsaved). If the API Key shows ********, the saved key is used.
